ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "total_adults" INTEGER /* Total number of adults in the region */,
  "male_adults" INTEGER /* Number of male adults in the region */,
  "female_adults" INTEGER /* Number of female adults in the region */,
  "adults_18_24" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 18-24 in the region */,
  "adults_25_44" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 25-44 in the region */,
  "adults_45_64" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 45-64 in the region */,
  "adults_65_plus" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 65+ in the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the region */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodation_types" (
  "accommodation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation type */,
  "accommodation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accommodation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accommodation type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the accommodation type */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per person for the accommodation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodation_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "accommodation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accommodation type */,
  "number_of_people" INTEGER /* Number of people accessing the accommodation type */,
  "duration_of_stay" INTEGER /* Average duration of stay in days */,
  "recurring_usage" INTEGER /* Indicator if the accommodation is used repeatedly by the same individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodation_usage_accommodation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_type_id") REFERENCES accommodation_types ("accommodation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodation_usage_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "number_of_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the family */,
  "number_of_single_parent_families" INTEGER /* Number of single-parent families */,
  "number_of_dependants" INTEGER /* Number of dependants in the family */,
  "average_family_size" REAL /* Average size of the family */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of adults in the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, social worker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Type of data viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "total_adults" INTEGER /* Total number of adults in the region for the year */,
  "male_adults" INTEGER /* Number of male adults in the region for the year */,
  "female_adults" INTEGER /* Number of female adults in the region for the year */,
  "adults_18_24" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 18-24 in the region for the year */,
  "adults_25_44" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 25-44 in the region for the year */,
  "adults_45_64" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 45-64 in the region for the year */,
  "adults_65_plus" INTEGER /* Number of adults aged 65+ in the region for the year */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Economic indicators for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_accommodation_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical usage record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "accommodation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accommodation type */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "number_of_people" INTEGER /* Number of people accessing the accommodation type for the year */,
  "seasonal_variation" INTEGER /* Indicator if there is seasonal variation in usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_accommodation_usage_accommodation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_type_id") REFERENCES accommodation_types ("accommodation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_accommodation_usage_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical family record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "number_of_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the family for the year */,
  "number_of_single_parent_families" INTEGER /* Number of single-parent families for the year */,
  "number_of_dependants" INTEGER /* Number of dependants in the family for the year */,
  "migration_pattern" TEXT /* Migration pattern of families for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_families_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region manager */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the region manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the region manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_managers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
